name: interviewready-mcp-server
description: MCP server for InterviewReady - fetches blogs, resources, course materials, and provides reminder tools.

interface.shortDescription: Fetch InterviewReady blogs, resources, course materials, and set reminders
interface.longDescription: MCP server for InterviewReady that exposes APIs to fetch blogs, resources, course materials, and allows users to add notes to their notepad and set Google reminders for upcoming classes.
